creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
The mod_rpaf configuration sample contains an error which makes it non functional as installed.

This patch fixes it.

It was reported to me by Agostino Zanutto <agostino@sfs.it>.

While at it I also fixed an error in PLIST_FILES and a portling warning.

patch is here:

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D17573
